final_prompt.prompt:
Create a realistic screenshot of a 抖音 live stream featuring 神仙姐姐 as the host.

Style/medium: needs a realistic 抖音 live-stream UI screenshot aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 9:16 vertical, with live-stream interface elements (viewer count, comment feed, gift animations, top bar) framing the subject
Subject: must include 神仙姐姐 as the live-stream host, holding a handwritten sign in front of her
Scene/backdrop: needs a typical indoor live-stream room atmosphere — exact backdrop is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, well-lit live-stream studio atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！" on the sign she is holding
Constraints: must preserve 抖音 live-stream UI layout with overlay elements visible; sign must be clearly legible and held in her hands
Avoid:
